title: ML Workflow
content_md:
# The ML Workflow

1. Collect data  
2. Clean & preprocess  
3. Split data (train/test)  
4. Train model  
5. Evaluate model  
6. Improve and repeat

Without discipline, results are meaningless.

questions.question: What step comes before training the model?
What is the purpose of evaluation?
questions.answer: To test model performance on unseen data.

questions.question: Why must ML be iterative?
questions.answer: Because improvement comes from testing and adjustment.

questions.question: What is the final goal of the workflow?
